PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON, MARY JEFFERSON, REASHAUN A MINOR THRU GUARDIAN AD LITEM JONES, XAVIER A MINOR THRU GUARDIAN AD LITEM JEFFERSON, MARY AS GUARDIAN FOR RESHAUN JEFFERSON DORSEY, LASANDRA AS GUARDIAN FOR XAVIER JONES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ-ARANA, VERONICA BEITZ, PAMELA ANN $7,501.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.89 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,686.89, DEFENDANTS TO PAY PLAINTIFFS: $2052.00 TO XAVIER JONES, $269.00 TO M JEFFERSON, $5180 TO R JEFFERSON; PLUS COSTS OF SUIT.
